StmtSimple.StatementText:
WITH BasePrincipals AS (SELECT p.Id AS PrincipalId, u.[Name], u.LoginName, u.Email, u.MobileNo, ISNULL(A.LastLogin, U.LastLogin) AS LastLogin, P.CreatedTime FROM [dbo].[User] U LEFT JOIN [dbo].[UserM2M] M ON U.PrincipalId = M.PrincipalId INNER JOIN [dbo].[Principal] P ON U.PrincipalId = P.Id OUTER APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 LastLogin FROM [dbo].[PrincipalAuthLog] WHERE U.PrincipalId = PrincipalId ORDER BY LastLogin DESC) A WHERE M.PrincipalId IS NULL AND p.DeletedTime IS NULL)
, AllPrincipals AS (SELECT PrincipalId AS Id,PrincipalId AS PId, [Name], LoginName, Email, MobileNo, LastLogin, CreatedTime FROM BasePrincipals UNION ALL SELECT child.UserGroupPrincipalId AS Id, parent.PId AS PId, parent.[Name], parent.LoginName, parent.Email, parent.MobileNo, parent.LastLogin, parent.CreatedTime FROM [dbo].[PrincipalUserGroup] child INNER JOIN [dbo].[Principal] PG ON child.UserGroupPrincipalId = PG.Id AND PG.DeletedTime IS NULL INNER JOIN AllPrincipals parent ON child.PrincipalId = parent.Id WHERE child.DeletedBy IS NULL) , Admittance AS (SELECT AllPrincipals.PId, ARes.AggregatedResourceId AS AdmittanceUser FROM AllPrincipals INNER JOIN [dbo].[Privilege] AP ON AllPrincipals.Id = AP.PrincipalId INNER JOIN [dbo].[Resource] ARes ON AP.ResourceId = ARes.Id LEFT JOIN [dbo].[UserGroup] AG ON AP.PrincipalId = AG.PrincipalId WHERE AP.DeletedTime IS NULL AND ARes.AggregatedResourceId = 'Admittance.SuperUser')
SELECT DISTINCT AllPrincipals.PId AS PrincipalId, AllPrincipals.[Name], AllPrincipals.LoginName, AllPrincipals.Email, AllPrincipals.MobileNo, AllPrincipals.LastLogin, AllPrincipals.CreatedTime, AllPrincipals.Id AS PrivilegePrincipalId, Ro.AggregatedRoleId AS AggregatedRole, SR.SecondaryRoleID, SR.SecondaryRoleName, SR.SecondaryRole, SR.SecondaryRoleValue, (CASE WHEN UAD.PrincipalId IS NULL THEN 'S' ELSE 'A' END) AS AccountType, Admittance.AdmittanceUser FROM AllPrincipals LEFT JOIN [dbo].[UserActiveDirectory] UAD ON AllPrincipals.PId = UAD.PrincipalId INNER JOIN [dbo].[Privilege] P ON AllPrincipals.Id = P.PrincipalId AND P.DeletedTime IS NULL INNER JOIN [dbo].[Role] Ro ON P.RoleId = Ro.Id INNER JOIN (SELECT Child.Id AS SubId, Parent.Id AS SecondaryRoleID, Parent.Name AS SecondaryRoleName, Parent.AggregatedRoleId AS SecondaryRole, Parent.RoleValue AS SecondaryRoleValue, Parent.RoleType AS SecondaryRoleType FROM [dbo].[Role] AS Parent INNER JOIN [dbo].[Role] AS Child ON Parent.ID = Child.ParentRoleId AND Parent.RoleType = 'K') SR ON Ro.Id = SR.SubId LEFT JOIN Admittance ON AllPrincipals.PId = Admittance.PId WHERE P.DeletedTime IS NULL AND SR.SecondaryRoleID = @roleId ORDER BY AllPrincipals.PId

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[dbo].[UserActiveDirectory].[PrincipalId] as [UAD].[PrincipalId] IS NULL THEN 'S' ELSE 'A' END
CASE WHEN [Expr1075]>(100) THEN (0) ELSE NULL END
CASE WHEN [Expr1079]>(100) THEN (0) ELSE NULL END
